description: Joshua — territorial/domain mapping. Records what has been explored, by whom, with what confidence. Future agents consult before exploring to avoid redundant coverage.

schema.domain: string — what was explored (e.g. 'src/auth/', 'Stripe API', 'competitor landscape')
schema.exploredBy: string — agent ID that explored it
schema.mandateId: string — the mandate that prompted the exploration
schema.confidence: high | medium | low — how thoroughly it was covered
schema.findings: string — brief summary of what was found (distilled)
schema.unexplored: string — what in this domain was NOT covered and why
schema.staleAfter: string — when this territory should be re-explored (e.g. '30 days', 'next major change')

note: Agents check territory.json during Genesis Phase. If a domain is already explored with high confidence and is not stale, skip it. If medium/low, explore with awareness of prior findings. The Joseph phase (/remember) also queries territory for relevant prior exploration.
